arts.ttl: Arsenal set for major windfall after smart deal
arts.sum: Tavares joined Lazio in the summer on a season-long loan after repeatedly failing to establish himself at Arsenal . This means that Arsenal will secure almost half of any future fee Lazio generate from the left-back's sale, though the club initially plan to keep him in Rome instead of immediately selling him on in the summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'learn asking price' for Bologna star but 'face competition' from Italian giants
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly learn the asking price of Bologna forward Santiago Castro but face competition from other Premier League clubs.

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard names three Ethan Nwaneri traits that make him his perfect Arsenal successor
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard has tipped Ethan Nwaneri for a bright future at Arsenal - having been impressed by the quality he has already shown at just 17. I think for a young player, sometimes it is just to help him to be himself and feel natural, and don’t be like too much on him.

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Man City-Juventus, Arsenal-Monaco
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Wednesday's Champions League action as Borussia Dortmund host Barcelona, Juventus take on Manchester City and Arsenal face AS Monaco.

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Monaco: Champions League – live
arts.sum: Champions League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Juventus v Manchester City – follow it live Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | And email Scott 3 min: Monaco are winning most of the early duels. Arsenal not quite up to speed yet. On the touchline, Mikel Arteta claps his hands by way of encouragement. 1 min: Ødegaard loses the ball within nanoseconds and Monaco go on the attack. Ben Seghir has a run at the Arsenal defence, but there’s no way through. A very early sign that Monaco aren’t here simply to make up the numbers. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Mikel Arteta names Arsenal XI for Monaco clash as extent of injury crisis laid bare
arts.sum: Arsenal host Monaco in the Champions League on Wednesday night, with boss Mikel Arteta facing a fresh injury crisis that has led to a raft of changes being made to his team

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Monaco - Champions League: Live score, team news and updates as Gunners make four changes - including an eye-catching one at left back - as Mikel Arteta's men look to cement top-eight spot with a win in their final European clash of the year
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest team news, updates and live score from the Champions League clash between Arsenal and Monaco at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Thomas Partey fires clear Arsenal injury message just hours before Monaco Champions League clash
arts.sum: Timber and Partey's training absence is likely due to load management but the concerns over Gabriel and Calafiori are only increasing with Arteta providing more detail on their respective injuries in the embargoed section of his press conference. “We need a cage there because he wants to go out, train and play,” he said of Calafiori.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Monaco LIVE: Champions League team news, line-ups and more tonight
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta’s men have their sights on a place in the top eight but need to overcome Monaco

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Monaco LIVE! Champions League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction today
arts.sum: Gunners looking to follow up big win over Sporting
